title: [Bard Guild, The Troubadour Pub]
description: The pub is a dark, cozy place redolent with the interwoven odors of ale, wine and stronger brews.  The mellow oak tones of floor, walls and ceiling are accented by rich oxblood-colored leather, which covers all the chairs occupying the room.  A long, low bar stretches across the back wall, and hanging just over it is a huge trophy, the snarling head of a massive black bear.

wayto.22094: ;e table = "carved"; fput "go #{table} table" if dothistimeout("go #{table} table", 25, /You (?:and your group )?head over to|waves.*you.*(?:invites|inviting) you(?: and your group)? to (?:join|come sit at)/) =~ /inviting you|invites you/
